title: 阪神JFの後に・精一杯のウイリー！

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeahhh! I did it—I really did it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has a good run in the junior G1,
overcoming that extremely high hurdle with sheer
willpower!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This is my power! Heck yeah! Hell yeah!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That was a piece of cake! You'd all better
remember the name "Vodka!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She waves to the crowd and makes a cool exit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With this definitive race now over, I decide to
throw a small party to celebrate this past year.
However...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man, I knew it... I'm feelin' a bit groggy today,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
J-just a little bit, though! I'll be back to normal in
no time!
choice_data_list: I don't want you to push yourself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Stop being so nice. How am I even
supposed to respond to that?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm real worn after that last race. I managed to
keep up the tough act, but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Runnin' and lookin' cool in the Twinkle Series is
wicked tiring.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heh. More than you can imagine.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Plus, it's somethin' I set my sights on myself. I
gotta see it through.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A lot happened in my first year, but I was able to
do it at my coolest... thanks to you.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Thankfully, there were only a handful of us runnin'
in the junior G1.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking back on it, I can say it was the perfect
way to get things going.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, when I tell her we need to choose a new
race goal...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hurp... Yikes, that one almost came out. Come on, Trainer, I'm too full to be talkin' about what's next.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But, if we gotta... The first thing that comes to
mind for next year's goal is...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sure, but hold off on that for now. That's my big
goal. First...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are two tours in the Classics: The Triple
Crown tour and the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Derby is the second race in the Triple Crown.
Before that, it's normal to run in the Satsuki Sho,
but...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know I've gotta do the Satsuki Sho. But before
that, I wanna try somethin' a little easier on the
feet.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So pick somethin' that could be a good steppin'
stone for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A good way to prepare for the Satsuki Sho would
be running in races like the Yayoi Sho or the
Spring Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm considering which of them would be best,
when—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whaaam!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: The Tulip Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A certain someone bursts in out of nowhere with a
suggestion completely out of left field.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Gimme a break. As if I wasn't tired enough
already, now I gotta deal with you?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I saw you run, Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Not that I was watching you or anything though. I
just happened to see it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Does that distinction really matter?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Considering it's you we're talking about, I guess that was at least decent for your first G1. However...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to show you how it's really done at the
Classics preliminary—the Tulip Sho!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You really think you can show me up?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That's right. After all, that was just a fluke.
Desperation is what got you a half-decent result.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But I'm different from you. I'll show you what it looks like to run with real skill!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: See you there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet whisks herself away as if riding a
passing storm. My best guess is she's secretly
jealous of how well Vodka ran.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I get back on topic and ask Vodka whether she'd
prefer the Yayoi Sho or the Spring Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm doin' the Tulip Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Oh no. Now Vodka is talking nonsense too.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah! This is good! If she really thinks she
can outrun me, then I need to see it in person!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm far from finished yet! I'll be runnin' even better
next year!
choice_data_list: Are you sure you want to do the Tulip Sho?
Are you sure you want to do the Tulip Sho?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Why? If I run in that, then does it mean I can't do
the Derby or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not necessarily. However, the Tulip Sho is the
first race in the Tiara Tour and the qualifying race
for the Oka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I explain that it's an irregular agenda.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Just 'cause it's not normal doesn't make it
an issue. There's no way I'm backin' down from
Scarlet's challenge.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's decided then! I'm comin' for you, Tulip!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I don't care about followin' norms anyway. It's not about where I run, it's about how I run!
